name: Kapa Gold Inc.
description: Kapa Gold Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of gold properties. The company is primarily engaged in exploring its historic, 100% owned, past-producing Blackhawk Gold Mine and surrounding areas located in San Bernardino County, California. Its exploration strategy involves conducting project-wide surveys to identify mineralization sources and re-entering underground workings to evaluate historic mineral deposits, aiming to unlock the economic potential of the region.
